title: Van Aert Deflated by Late Puncture in Season Debut as Visma Unearths a New Cobblestone Gem
content:
Van Aert unlucky again in comeback to racing at Le Samyn as teammate Hagenes' long-range raid denied by Meeus and the sprinters.

Read the full article at Van Aert Deflated by Late Puncture in Season Debut as Visma Unearths a New Cobblestone Gem on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
